subcodes.first_line: Your letter was received and the calumnies of the people of veils became known and evident. A response concerning this matter has been penned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید و مفتریات اهل حجبات معلوم و واضح گردید جوابی در اینخصوص مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @review of publications, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
